name: Kunshan Huguang Auto Harness Co.,Ltd.
summary: Kunshan Huguang Auto Harness Co.,Ltd. engages in the research and development, and production of automotive high and low voltage wiring harness assembly products in China. It offers engine, KSK, door, HV, front cabin, instrument, cable, and ABS wire harness products. The company is based in Kunshan, China.
